'''Maphus Tria''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] where the [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] [[Tord Gamb]] ran a con that netted him several hundred thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

{{Planet-stub}}
